part1.question: Do you like to keep fit?
part1.followUp: What do you do to stay healthy?

part1.question: How important is a healthy diet to you?
part1.followUp: Have your eating habits changed over time?

part1.question: Do you cook your own meals?
part1.followUp: Where do you usually buy your food?

part1.question: What kind of food is popular in your country?
part1.followUp: Do you think traditional food is being replaced by fast food?

part2.cueCard: Describe a healthy habit that you have developed.
bulletPoints: why you decided to develop this habit
and explain how this habit has benefited your life

questions: Why do many people find it difficult to maintain healthy habits?
What role should the government play in promoting public health?
How has the health and fitness industry changed in recent years?
Do you think people in the future will be healthier than people today?
